name: Tier-1 Comparison Pressure
description: The environment constantly presents faster, richer, more successful reference groups.

name: Dense But Noisy Field
description: The field offers many doors, but also makes every door look insufficient once opened.

name: Volatile Opportunity Market
description: There are real opportunities, but timing and execution matter more than perfect certainty.

name: High Cost Lock
description: High living costs make even meaningful changes feel expensive and morally risky.

name: Credential Visibility Market
description: The environment rewards visible proof, labels, public output, and credible social signals.
